meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Tutorial
content.seo_description: Overcome project stagnation with the Antigravity project template. An advanced guide for freelancers using Claude Code to ship high-value SaaS apps faster.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates creative paralysis by providing a modular, AI-ready scaffold that automates boilerplate and architecture. By integrating this with Claude Code, you transform conceptual ambiguity into a production-grade codebase within minutes, allowing you to focus exclusively on high-margin business logic and client-specific requirements.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. Your client needs a high-performance SaaS solution, but the 'blank canvas' syndrome is draining your billable hours. The industry moves faster than your manual scaffolding, and every minute spent configuring folder structures is a minute lost on innovation.

This is where the Antigravity template changes the game. It is not just a boilerplate; it is an architectural paradigm designed for speed and scale. By pairing this template with Claude Code, you delegate the heavy lifting of infrastructure to the machine, effectively turning yourself into a high-leverage architect who ships faster than the competition.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root project structure using the Antigravity CLI to ensure type-safety and modularity from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity production-ready template with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Domain Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Inject your specific business requirements into the scaffold to define the core database schema and API routing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and generate the Prisma schema for a multi-tenant user authentication system.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate Prisma schema for multi-tenant users and roles'

steps.title: Automate Endpoint Generation
steps.description: Rapidly build out your API layer to ensure your frontend has immediate access to data endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the RESTful API routes for user CRUD operations and include error handling based on Antigravity standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create API routes for CRUD operations following project standards'

steps.title: Implement UI Components via AI
steps.description: Use Claude to populate your UI with high-conversion components that adhere to your design system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard sidebar and header using the existing UI component library in the Antigravity template.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Build dashboard layout using existing UI components'

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Finalize the build by running automated tests and preparing the CI/CD pipeline for deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the Antigravity test suite and provide a deployment configuration for Vercel integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run test suite and generate Vercel config'

pro_tips: Always override default template styles early to prevent 'cookie-cutter' SaaS aesthetics that kill client trust.
Use Claude Code's context awareness to refactor the entire Antigravity project structure if your requirements shift mid-build.
Implement a custom 'hooks' folder to encapsulate business logic, making it easier for Claude to maintain code consistency.
Leverage Antigravity's built-in telemetry to debug production issues before the client even notices them.
Keep your prompt library for Claude Code organized by task type (e.g., 'Schema-Gen', 'UI-Component', 'Refactor') for instant repeatability.
content.next_steps: Once the boilerplate is deployed, audit your code for specific security vulnerabilities and begin the iterative process of adding client-requested features using the same AI-driven workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting time on repetitive project setup and start delivering high-value software to your clients with precision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
